value.found_quote: NotebookLM (Google NotebookLM; LM short for "Language Model") is an online research and note-taking retrieval-augmented generation tool developed by Google Labs that uses artificial intelligence (AI), specifically Google Gemini, to assist users in interacting with their documents.
value.rationale: The page describes NotebookLM as a Google Labs product that had its "experimental" status removed on October 17, 2024, and continues to receive feature updates through 2026, indicating it is currently active.
